prompt: Place the cartoonish octopus from the reference at the same depth as the pineapple house (scale accordingly), and overlay a consistent depth map on the whole image.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which serves as the source image and features Spongebob, Patrick, and the pineapple house. Introduce the character Squidward from image 2 (the reference image) into image 1. Position Squidward such that he appears at the same depth plane as the pineapple house, scaling him proportionally to maintain consistent perspective. Subsequently, overlay a consistent, full-scene depth map onto the entire edited image.
